message:
feat(tui): refine event handling and multiple TUI screen views

Concurrent agent work: improve TUI interaction responsiveness and
update several screen implementations:

- tui_events.rs: refine event dispatch and keyboard handling
- explorer.rs: update explorer screen layout and navigation
- messages.rs: improve message list rendering
- search.rs: refine search screen filtering and results display
- timeline.rs: update timeline visualization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
